Usage:

flua 1.0.0+531e68f3926245f542f08d3289cd1e610ed90d8d
Copyright (C) 2025 flua

Usage:
  flua <command> [options]
  flua <file>                 # Legacy: run file directly
  flua                       # Legacy: start REPL

Commands:
  run        Execute a Lua script file
  repl       Start interactive REPL mode
  compile    Compile Lua script to executable

Options:
  -h, --help    Show help information
  --version     Show version information

result.stdout:
Usage: compile [options] <input-file>

Compile Lua script to executable

Arguments:
  <input-file>           Input Lua script file

Options:
  -o, --output <file>    Output file path (required)
  -t, --target <target>  Compilation target (library, console, nativeaot) [default: library]
  --optimization <level> Optimization level (debug, release) [default: release]
  --debug                Include debug information
  --name <name>          Assembly name
  -r, --reference <ref>  Additional assembly reference (can be used multiple times)
  -h, --help             Show this help
